subcodes.first_line: The Divine Book calleth out with most exalted voice amidst the servants and handmaidens, guiding all to the supreme horizon [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: کتاب الهی باعلی الندآء مابین عباد و اماء ندا مینماید و کل را بافق اعلی راه
subcodes.subjects: @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @suffering and imprisonment, @spiritual prerequisites of teaching the Cause, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
